case_title: RENT A CENTER VS WALTON, TINA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,167.83 FILED BY RENT A CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, TINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTON, TINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTON, TINA $1,167.83 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,267.83, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO RECEIVE THE JUDGMENT FROM DEFENDANT AND PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO ALSO RECEIVE THE FURNITURE FROM DEFENDNAT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
